company.selector: div[role='button']:has(svg[id*='company']) p, section[componentkey*='Topcard'] a[href*='/company/'] p, div[componentkey*='entity']:first-child:has(ul) a[href*='/company/']:has(svg[id*='company']) + div p:first-of-type, div[componentkey*='entity']:first-child:has(ul) figure:has(svg[id*='company']) + div p:first-of-type, div[componentkey*='entity']:first-child:not(:has(ul)) a[href*='/company/']:has(svg[id*='company']) + div p:nth-of-type(2), div[componentkey*='entity']:first-child:not(:has(ul)) figure:has(svg[id*='company']) + div p:nth-of-type(2), a[href*='/company/'] p:first-of-type

multipleCompany.selectorSpan: #experience + div + div ul li:nth-of-type(1) ul li > span, [data-testid*='ExperienceTopLevelSection'] ul li > span

pic_url.selector: main div[aria-label='Profile photo'] img, main .pv-top-card-profile-picture__image--show, [data-testid='profile-photo'] img

university.selector: div[role='button']:has(svg[id*='school']) p, section[componentkey*='Topcard'] a[href*='/school/'] p, a[href*='/school/']:has(svg[id*='school']) + div a[href*='/school/'] p:first-of-type, a[href*='/school/']:has(img[alt*='logo']) + div a[href*='/school/'] p:first-of-type, [data-view-name='profile-card-education'] p:first-of-type, [data-testid*='EducationTopLevelSection'] p:first-of-type

x.com.full_name: div[data-testid='User-Name'] > div > div > a > div > div > span > span
